package rulecoverage

func NegativeStringsReplaceNegOneReplaceall() string {
    ruleID := "strings_replace_neg_one_replaceall"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`strings.Replace(..., -1)` instead of `strings.ReplaceAll(...)`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
